I'm definitely using this for my weight training. I love how we can pick a muscle and get excises for it. This is so much better than getting confused with lots of youtube videos. @vincent\_will Thanks for making this. I'll be sharing this with my friends.

Being 1 year into my fitness journey and having lost a good amount of weight, doing general exercises- I was looking at a solution that will help with hypertrophy and personalization. This looks super cool !

Brilliant. This is super helpful. If you have a blog where you have described your journey or something would love to give it a read. Great idea and very helpful to not think about the program.

Report

•3 reviews

Congrats on the launch and goog luck! I really like this app, it's super easy to use and for sure very helpful for people who wants to start exercise but don't know how, or just struggling with creating their own workout plan. You can just simply choose, which muscles you want to train today and gives you a plan, awesome! How are you planning to develop your product?

Report

 6 views

•2 reviews [...] Report

 6 views

•2 reviews

Wow, this is really good, and really well thoughtout. Typically, when I try to decide a workout, I have to switch between multiple videos, blog posts, etc. to get the information I want. While doing it on workout.lol, I got everything done in 5 mins, without even moving tabs. And that's even down to getting the videos of the exercises! Love it!

Thanks a lot! I'm happy you found it helpful 😊

Really nice, I was searching for something like this just a couple weeks ago. It will solve my pain! (And cause me more, for gains :D) I did get an error when trying to shuffle an exercise though, might want to look into that. Thanks!

#### What's great

I’ve been using hevy for about 2 months now and it’s been really helpful for keeping my workouts organized. logging sets and reps is quick, and checking my progress over time keeps me motivated. the routines are easy to set up, and the community side adds a nice boost when i need extra push. it’s been a reliable tool for staying consistent at the gym.
